series_metadata.series_description: Record includes, but is not limited to, documents related to all federalcash draws in payment for agency services (such as; revenue documents, draw supportdocumentation, UI draw memorandums, draw documents pertaining to agency custodial accounts[TRA, NAFTA, DUA Benefits]) and Cash/Revenue Reconciliations (e.g., Electronic Benefit Transfer;Unemployment Trust Fund: UI Wire, CWC Electronic Payments, Book Transfers, Trial Balance).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsoleted, replaced then destroy., Electronic: Erase
